recommendations.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
recommendations.overview: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

recommendations.title: Vanguard
recommendations.overview: Covert security company Vanguard is the last hope of survival for an accountant after he is targeted by the world's deadliest mercenary organization.

recommendations.title: A Legend
recommendations.overview: An archeologist noticed that the texture of the relics discovered during the excavation of a glacier closely resembled a jade pendant seen in one of his dreams. He and his team then embark on an expedition into the depths of the glacier.

recommendations.title: Police Story 4: First Strike
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Crime, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Hong Kong cop Chan Ka-Kui returns, working with Interpol to track down and arrest an illegal weapons dealer. Chan later realizes that things are not as simple as they appear and soon finds himself to be a pawn of an organization posing as Russian int

recommendations.title: Mr. Magoo
recommendations.overview: Mr. Magoo, a man with terrible eyesight, gets caught up in a museum robbery.

recommendations.title: The Myth
recommendations.overview: When a fellow scientist asks for Jack's help in locating the mausoleum of China's first emperor, the past collides violently with the present as Jack discovers his amazing visions are based in fact.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Yoga
recommendations.overview: Two professors team up to locate a lost treasure and embark on an adventure that takes them from a Tibetan ice cave to Dubai, and to a mountain temple in India.

recommendations.title: Chungking Express
recommendations.overview: Two melancholic Hong Kong policemen fall in love: one with a mysterious underworld figure, the other with a beautiful and ethereal server at a late-night restaurant.

recommendations.title: A Bronx Tale
recommendations.overview: Set in the Bronx during the tumultuous 1960s, an adolescent boy is torn between his honest, working-class father and a violent yet charismatic crime boss. Complicating matters is the youngster's growing attraction - forbidden in his neighborhood - fo

recommendations.title: Fallen Angels
recommendations.overview: An assassin goes through obstacles as he attempts to escape his violent lifestyle despite the opposition of his partner, who is secretly attracted to him.
